## Summary

- describe the user-facing or contributor-facing change
- note any docs, release, or workflow updates
- 用中文或英文说明这次改动对用户、贡献者或发布流程的影响

## Validation

- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] relevant CLI/manual flow exercised
- [ ] docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] 如果改动影响文档或界面，确认中英文入口都已同步

## Risks

- note regressions, compatibility concerns, or follow-up work
- 补充潜在回归、兼容性风险或后续待办
